name: Forsetti Agentic Development Policy
description: Comprehensive machine-readable instructions for coding agents working with Forsetti or apps that consume Forsetti.

intended_for: AI coding agents operating in a Forsetti repository
AI coding agents operating in consumer applications built on Forsetti
how_to_apply: Provide this file to your coding agent at task start.
Require agent acknowledgement of all mandatory rules before code changes.
Treat all MUST and MUST_NOT rules as hard constraints.

operating_modes.when_to_use: Agent is working inside the Forsetti framework repository.
operating_modes.goal: Preserve Forsetti architecture integrity and internal guardrails.

operating_modes.when_to_use: Agent is working in an app that consumes Forsetti.
operating_modes.goal: Use Forsetti as a sealed dependency and enforce architecture in the consumer app.

mandatory_rules.rule: Agent MUST use native Apple technologies only for runtime/framework behavior (Swift, SwiftUI where needed, Apple frameworks).
mandatory_rules.rationale: Forsetti is intentionally native-first for platform reliability and long-term maintainability.

mandatory_rules.rule: Agent MUST treat Forsetti as a sealed framework in consumer projects.
mandatory_rules.rationale: Consumer integrations must remain stable and upgradeable without internal framework patching.

mandatory_rules.rule: Agent MUST_NOT modify, copy, fork, or patch Forsetti internals in consumer repositories to implement app-specific behavior.
mandatory_rules.rationale: Internal edits create unsupported divergence and break upgrade paths.

mandatory_rules.rule: Agent MUST implement extension needs using public Forsetti APIs (modules, services, runtime composition) and request upstream enhancement for API gaps.
mandatory_rules.rationale: Public contracts are the supported extension mechanism.

mandatory_rules.rule: Agent MUST enforce strict object-oriented modular design: protocol boundaries, constructor dependency injection, encapsulation, and final classes unless extension is intentional and documented.
mandatory_rules.rationale: These constraints prevent hidden coupling and unsafe inheritance drift.

mandatory_rules.rule: Agent MUST keep dependency direction one-way and avoid circular dependencies across modules/targets.
mandatory_rules.rationale: One-way dependency flow is the foundation of Forsetti modularity.

mandatory_rules.rule: Agent MUST run required verification commands before marking work complete.
mandatory_rules.rationale: Architecture and lint/test gates must be continuously enforced.

mandatory_rules.rule: In framework_repo_mode, Agent MUST run the iOS simulator package build command to match CI build expectations.
mandatory_rules.rationale: Framework readiness requires parity with the CI ios-build gate, not only lint/tests.

mandatory_rules.rule: Agent MUST respect proprietary licensing boundaries and MUST_NOT imply open-source usage rights.
mandatory_rules.rationale: Forsetti is proprietary software under explicit licensing terms.

layer_purpose.ForsettiCore: Platform-agnostic core contracts, runtime logic, compatibility, activation, policies.
layer_purpose.ForsettiPlatform: Native platform adapters and entitlement/service implementations.
layer_purpose.ForsettiHostTemplate: Generic host composition and SwiftUI host UI.

must_not_import_rules.why: Platform layer should provide adapters, not host/UI composition.
Example modules must remain contract-focused and decoupled.
Host template must remain generic, not hardwired to sample modules.

runtime_and_activation: Runtime boot MUST refresh entitlements before restoring persisted activation state.
Runtime shutdown MUST deactivate loaded modules without clearing persisted activation state.
UI module activation MUST verify ForsettiUIModule type compatibility before lifecycle start.
manifest_loading: Strict manifests directory loading MUST fail fast on invalid manifest JSON/validation errors.
Fallback recursive manifest discovery MUST ignore unrelated JSON payloads that are not manifest-shaped.
Manifest discovery MUST fail on duplicate moduleID values.
routing_and_host_contract: Overlay routing MUST resolve against active overlay schema only.
Pointer and route targets MUST validate against host base destinations and overlay slot catalog.
Host routing actions SHOULD expose explicit route resolution outcomes for diagnostics.

allowed_patterns: Implement app-owned modules using ForsettiModule or ForsettiUIModule.
Use Forsetti service container and protocol-based service contracts.
Compose runtime and host through public bootstrap/runtime APIs.
Create app-level architecture tests and lint rules mirroring Forsetti principles.
forbidden_patterns: Editing Forsetti package internals inside vendor or copied source folders.
Adding reverse dependencies from app targets into Forsetti internals.
Bypassing entitlement/capability checks with ad-hoc host-side overrides.

planning: Agent MUST state proposed file changes before editing.
Agent MUST identify which operating mode applies.
Agent MUST call out any requested action that conflicts with mandatory rules.
implementation: Agent MUST implement minimal cohesive changes.
Agent MUST preserve public API stability unless change request explicitly requires API change.
Agent MUST add or update tests when behavior changes.
Agent MUST avoid hidden globals and implicit singleton coupling.
validation: Agent MUST run lint and tests for changed scope at minimum.
Agent MUST report command results and unresolved failures clearly.
Agent MUST NOT claim completion if required checks failed.
delivery: Agent MUST summarize what changed, why it changed, and what guardrails passed.
Agent MUST include any residual risks and follow-up actions.

definition_of_done: No forbidden architecture/import pattern was introduced.
Required verification commands passed for the active mode.
Documentation/comments updated where behavior or policy changed.
Output summary includes validations and any known limitations.

on_rule_conflict: Stop and explain the conflicting request.
Provide a compliant alternative implementation plan.
Proceed only with compliant path unless policy owner updates rules.
on_failed_guardrails: Fix failures or report exact blockers with command outputs.

suggested_agent_prompt_template.template: You are coding in {MODE}. Follow agentic-coding-policy.json as hard constraints. Confirm R001-R009 compliance (when applicable), then implement only via allowed patterns. Before finishing, run required_verification_commands for {MODE}, report results, and include residual risks.
